projects.title: Urban Reforestation Berlin
projects.description: Native tree planting project in urban parks to improve air quality and create green corridors.
projects.description_es: Proyecto de plantación de árboles nativos en parques urbanos para mejorar la calidad del aire y crear corredores verdes.

projects.title: Seine River Cleanup
projects.description: Cleanup campaign to eliminate plastics and pollutants from the emblematic Parisian river.
projects.description_es: Campaña de limpieza para eliminar plásticos y contaminantes del emblemático río parisino.

projects.title: Community Gardens Madrid
projects.description: Creation of urban green spaces for sustainable agriculture and environmental education.
projects.description_es: Creación de espacios verdes urbanos para agricultura sostenible y educación ambiental.

projects.title: Migratory Bird Protection
projects.description: Monitoring and protection of bird migration routes in northern Europe.
projects.description_es: Monitoreo y protección de rutas migratorias de aves en el norte de Europa.

projects.title: Educational Robotics Workshops
projects.description: Educational program to teach robotics and programming to children and youth using recycled materials.
projects.description_es: Programa educativo para enseñar robótica y programación a niños y jóvenes usando materiales reciclados.

projects.title: School Environmental Education
projects.description: Environmental awareness program in primary and secondary schools.
projects.description_es: Programa de sensibilización ambiental en escuelas primarias y secundarias.

projects.title: Rural Digital Libraries
projects.description: Installation of digital access points in rural communities to reduce the technology gap.
projects.description_es: Instalación de puntos de acceso digital en comunidades rurales para reducir la brecha tecnológica.

projects.title: Online Sustainability Courses
projects.description: Free educational platform on sustainable practices and circular economy.
projects.description_es: Plataforma educativa gratuita sobre prácticas sostenibles y economía circular.

projects.title: Community Mobile Clinic
projects.description: Itinerant medical service that brings basic health care to disadvantaged communities. Includes checkups, vaccination and preventive education.
projects.description_es: Servicio médico itinerante que lleva atención sanitaria básica a comunidades desfavorecidas. Incluye chequeos, vacunación y educación preventiva.

projects.title: Mental Health Program
projects.description: Workshops, group therapy and community support to promote mental well-being in urban areas.
projects.description_es: Talleres, terapia grupal y acompañamiento comunitario para promover el bienestar mental en zonas urbanas.

projects.title: Inclusive Sports
projects.description: Adapted sports activities for people with physical and cognitive disabilities.
projects.description_es: Actividades deportivas adaptadas para personas con discapacidades físicas y cognitivas.

projects.title: Community Nutrition
projects.description: Healthy cooking workshops and nutritional education for low-income families.
projects.description_es: Talleres de cocina saludable y educación nutricional para familias de bajos recursos.

projects.title: Inclusive Neighborhood Centers
projects.description: Community spaces that foster social integration and mutual support among neighbors.
projects.description_es: Espacios comunitarios que fomentan la integración social y el apoyo mutuo entre vecinos.

projects.title: Refugee Support Network
projects.description: Integration and support program for refugee families in local communities.
projects.description_es: Programa de integración y apoyo para familias refugiadas en comunidades locales.

projects.title: Cultural Festivals
projects.description: Events that celebrate cultural diversity and promote social cohesion.
projects.description_es: Eventos que celebran la diversidad cultural y promueven la cohesión social.

projects.title: Youth Mentoring Program
projects.description: Connects young people with adult mentors for academic and professional guidance.
projects.description_es: Conecta jóvenes con mentores adultos para orientación académica y profesional.

projects.title: Beach Recovery
projects.description: Cleanup and restoration of coastal ecosystems affected by marine pollution.
projects.description_es: Limpieza y restauración de ecosistemas costeros afectados por la contaminación marina.

projects.title: Coral Protection
projects.description: Coral reef restoration project in the Mediterranean.
projects.description_es: Proyecto de restauración de arrecifes de coral en el Mediterráneo.

projects.title: Marine Monitoring
projects.description: Citizen science to study marine biodiversity and the impact of climate change.
projects.description_es: Ciencia ciudadana para estudiar la biodiversidad marina y el impacto del cambio climático.

projects.title: Sustainable Fishing
projects.description: Education on responsible fishing practices and marine conservation.
projects.description_es: Educación sobre prácticas de pesca responsable y conservación marina.

projects.title: Urban Gardens
projects.description: Creation of urban agricultural spaces to promote local and sustainable food.
projects.description_es: Creación de espacios agrícolas urbanos para promover la alimentación local y sostenible.

projects.title: Food Bank
projects.description: Redistribution of surplus food to combat waste and food insecurity.
projects.description_es: Redistribución de alimentos excedentes para combatir el desperdicio y la inseguridad alimentaria.

projects.title: Regenerative Agriculture
projects.description: Promotion of agricultural techniques that restore soil health and biodiversity.
projects.description_es: Promoción de técnicas agrícolas que restauran la salud del suelo y la biodiversidad.

projects.title: Sustainable Cooking
projects.description: Cooking workshops with local ingredients and waste reduction techniques.
projects.description_es: Talleres de cocina con ingredientes locales y técnicas de reducción de desperdicios.

projects.title: Green Hackathon
projects.description: 48-hour hackathon to develop sustainable technological solutions. Includes IoT workshops, blockchain and responsible consumption apps.
projects.description_es: Hackathon de 48 horas para desarrollar soluciones tecnológicas sostenibles. Incluye talleres de IoT, blockchain y apps de consumo responsable.

projects.title: Sustainable Innovation Lab
projects.description: Collaborative space to develop green technologies: IoT sensors, circular economy apps and renewable energy platforms.
projects.description_es: Espacio colaborativo para desarrollar tecnologías verdes: sensores IoT, apps de economía circular y plataformas de energía renovable.

projects.title: Smart City Lab
projects.description: Development of smart city solutions: waste management with sensors, public transport optimization and energy efficiency.
projects.description_es: Desarrollo de soluciones de ciudad inteligente: gestión de residuos con sensores, optimización de transporte público y eficiencia energética.

projects.title: Blockchain for Environmental Transparency
projects.description: Workshop on using blockchain to track sustainable supply chains and verifiable environmental certifications.
projects.description_es: Workshop sobre uso de blockchain para rastrear cadenas de suministro sostenibles y certificaciones ambientales verificables.
